description: Intel 80486 instruction additions. The 80486 integrated an on-chip FPU and cache controller and added byte-swap, compare-and-exchange, and cache-control instructions.

opcodes.description: Reverse byte order of 32-bit register: byte[3]↔byte[0], byte[2]↔byte[1]

instructions.description: Reverses the byte order of a 32-bit (or 64-bit with REX.W) register for endian conversion.
instructions.notes: Opcodes 0x0F 0xC8–0x0F 0xCF encode BSWAP for each of the 8 registers (rd = register number 0–7). With REX.W, operates on 64-bit register.

opcodes.description: Exchange r8 with r/m8, then store sum in r/m8; src receives original dst
Exchange r16/32 with r/m16/32, then store sum in r/m16/32

instructions.description: Exchange and Add: exchanges dst and src, then stores the sum into dst. Used for atomic increment with LOCK prefix.

opcodes.description: Compare AL with r/m8; if equal store r8 in r/m8, else load r/m8 into AL
Compare AX/EAX with r/m16/32; if equal store r16/32 in r/m16/32, else load into AX/EAX

instructions.description: Compares AL/AX/EAX with the destination; if equal, stores the source register; otherwise loads the destination into AL/AX/EAX. Used for lock-free synchronization.

opcodes.description: Invalidate internal caches without writing back to memory (data loss possible)

instructions.description: Invalidate Internal Caches: flushes internal caches without writing back to memory. Requires ring-0.
instructions.notes: Requires ring-0. WBINVD is preferred to avoid data loss.

opcodes.description: Write back all modified cache lines to memory, then flush all caches

instructions.description: Write Back and Invalidate Cache: writes back all modified cache lines to memory, then flushes all caches. Requires ring-0.

opcodes.description: Invalidate TLB entry for the virtual address in the memory operand

instructions.description: Invalidate TLB Entry: invalidates the TLB entry for the specified virtual address. Requires ring-0.
